findings.description: PascalCase class names used in the section's Java code examples are missing from hints: CM311AC1Component (the class extending DbAccessSupport), DbAccessSupport (the base class), SqlResultSet (returned by retrieve()).
findings.source_evidence: Source contains: `public class CM311AC1Component extends DbAccessSupport`, `SqlResultSet rs = select.retrieve();`
